_comment: User registry (multi-tenant). Adding a user = one entry. EVERYONE shares the one relevance ranking (the shared QUALITY gate), delivered DAILY. Personalization = (a) each user's own +/- feedback (signals namespaced per user: sent:<id>, affinity:<id>, fb_*:<id>) AND (b) an optional one-sentence 'interest': we embed it once and steer that user's pick by semantic match to each item (two-tower retrieval, O(items+users) — the 100th user is just one more sentence to embed). Interest lets relevant items (incl. research) SURFACE for a user without hand-filtering sources; omit it for the pure shared ranking. min_score is the quality bar (relevance + affinity + interest match must clear it) so a quiet day sends nothing. 'email_var' names the env/Actions var holding the address (keeps addresses out of git). The agent maintaining this app is just user 'builder'; its digest, when non-empty, drives the gh-aw self-improve loop. Same machinery as every user — no special path.

users.interest: Techniques and changes I can apply to improve THIS AI/LLM pipeline: better prompting and instructions, evaluation and ranking methods, retrieval and RAG, agent design and orchestration, prompt/agent optimization, and breaking changes or new features in the Azure, OpenAI, Python, and agent-framework SDKs this repo depends on.
